title: Badri
subTitle: A naive villager goes to the city to earn money and buy gold bangles for his mother. However, circumstances force him to fight with criminals and he ends up becoming a gangster.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Dattha
subTitle: Reformed Rowdy Datta poses as a stranger's son to help a sick woman, but the deception puts his life in danger as he uncovers hidden truths.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Yudda Bhoomi
subTitle: An army officer comes to his village for a vacation. However, seeing the bad state of his village, he stands up against the atrocities that people face because of the evil landlord.

title: Amigos
subTitle: Three identical men befriend each other through a doppelganger-finding application and things go well until the criminal past of one amongst them emerges.

title: Peddanna
subTitle: A man loves his younger sister dearly and does everything to make her happy. When she elopes with her lover to Kolkata, he goes to great lengths to protect her from the clutches of an evil gangster.

title: Sreevari Priyuralu
subTitle: A doctor marries an innocent village girl but soon rekindles an affair with his ex-lover. Later, when his parents discover the betrayal, they decide to hold him accountable for his actions.

title: Deva
subTitle: Two brothers, Vasu and Vel, who happen to be twins are separated at birth and raised in contrasting worlds. Subsequently, Vasu becomes a disciplined officer, while Vel leads a rugged life.

title: Bhadra
subTitle: An ambitious youngster relocates to the city in pursuit of building his career. However, he unwittingly falls in love with a woman whose family is associated with the mafia.

title: People's War
subTitle: When an industrialist decides to start a thermal power plant project in Srikakulam district, a young leader and an honest politician protest against it with the support of the villagers.

title: People's War
subTitle: When an industrialist decides to start a thermal power plant project in Srikakulam district, a young leader and an honest politician protest against it with the support of the villagers.

subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Anuraga Devatha

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Adarshavanthudu
subTitle: Sridhar, a criminal lawyer, fights against dishonest and corrupt people and provides justice to the needy, infuriating his uncle and the village head.

title: Ride
subTitle: A man develops an unexpected friendship with the new owner of his stolen bike and attempts to seek a mutually beneficial arrangement.

title: Ammoru
subTitle: Bhavani is an orphan and an ardent devotee of Goddess Ammoru. The goddess comes to Bhavani's rescue when a vengeful and evil Ghorakh intends to ruin her life.

title: Don Seenu
subTitle: Inspired by Amitabh Bachchan's Don, a fan sets out to make a name for himself in the underworld. However, a case of mistaken identity may turn this endeavour into a comedy of errors.

title: Donga Dongadi
subTitle: A young boy's terrible behaviour towards girls makes his father lose respect for him. So, he begins to turn his life around to gain back his father's trust.

title: Alluda Majaka
subTitle: Living in the company of two hostile, rich families, a righteous man attempts to clear his sister's name and restore her honour.

title: Sri Karam
subTitle: Siva uses street plays to fight injustice, while Geeta admires his ideals and Vasantha's painful experience triggers a chain of life-changing events for everyone around her.

title: Sri Karam
subTitle: Siva uses street plays to fight injustice, while Geeta admires his ideals and Vasantha's painful experience triggers a chain of life-changing events for everyone around her.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Tiger Ramudu
subTitle: Ramu, a petty thief, almost gets caught by a policeman, Prabhakar. Though he continues working as a burglar, his life changes completely when he meets Radha, Prabhakar's beautiful sister.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Kayyala Ammai Kalavari Abbai
subTitle: Kayyala Ammai Kalavari Abbai

title: Vijetha
subTitle: Ram, a careless youth, grows up oblivious to the sacrifices his father makes in order to fulfil all his desires. However, a major incident motivates him to change his ways.

title: Mahanubhavudu
subTitle: Anand, a young man who lives with obsessive-compulsive disorder, faces a dilemma after his fixation comes in the way of having a normal relationship.

title: Avatharam
subTitle: When Karkotakudu, a monster, attempts to destroy Earth to take control of the planet, Rajeshwari, a devotee of Goddess Akkamma, decides to fight the behemoth.

title: Raju Bhai
subTitle: Raju, the right-hand man of a gangster, falls in love with Anjali and changes his criminal ways. Their relationship suffers due to misunderstandings between them.

title: Hanuman Junction
subTitle: A man falls in love with the sister of two gangsters. However, in order to marry her, he must convince her brothers and thus decides to join their company.

title: Aapadbandhavudu
subTitle: Madhava, a servant, falls in love with Hema, his employer's daughter, but is unable to show it due to societal norms. He later decides to help her when she is suddenly put in a psychiatric hospital.
